Detailed Description

template<typename T, bool isPodLike>
class llvm::SmallVectorTemplateBase< T, isPodLike >

SmallVectorTemplateBase<isPodLike = false> - This is where we put method implementations that are designed to work with non-POD-like T's.

Definition at line 168 of file SmallVector.h.

◆ grow()

template<typename T, bool isPodLike>
void llvm::SmallVectorTemplateBase< T, isPodLike >::grow ( size_t MinSize = 0)
protected

Grow the allocated memory (without initializing new elements), doubling the size of the allocated memory. Guarantees space for at least one more element, or MinSize more elements if specified.

Definition at line 288 of file SmallVector.h.

References llvm::SmallVectorTemplateCommon< T, typename >::begin(), llvm::SmallVectorBase::BeginX, llvm::SmallVectorTemplateCommon< T, typename >::capacity(), llvm::SmallVectorBase::CapacityX, destroy_range(), llvm::SmallVectorTemplateCommon< T, typename >::end(), llvm::SmallVectorTemplateCommon< T, typename >::isSmall(), llvm::NextPowerOf2(), llvm::SmallVectorTemplateCommon< T, typename >::setEnd(), llvm::SmallVectorTemplateCommon< T, typename >::size(), T, and uninitialized_move().

Referenced by llvm::SmallVectorImpl< PointerUnion< Function *, Node * > >::append(), llvm::SmallVectorImpl< PointerUnion< Function *, Node * > >::append(), llvm::SmallVectorImpl< PointerUnion< Function *, Node * > >::assign(), llvm::SmallVectorImpl< PointerUnion< Function *, Node * > >::insert(), llvm::SmallVectorImpl< PointerUnion< Function *, Node * > >::insert(), llvm::SmallVectorImpl< T >::operator=(), llvm::SmallVectorImpl< T >::operator=(), llvm::SmallVectorTemplateBase< T, isPodLike< T >::value >::push_back(), llvm::SmallVectorTemplateBase< T, isPodLike< T >::value >::push_back(), llvm::SmallVectorTemplateBase< T, true >::push_back(), llvm::SmallVectorImpl< PointerUnion< Function *, Node * > >::reserve(), llvm::SmallVectorImpl< PointerUnion< Function *, Node * > >::resize(), llvm::SmallVectorImpl< PointerUnion< Function *, Node * > >::resize(), and llvm::SmallVectorImpl< T >::swap().

◆ move()

template<typename T, bool isPodLike>
template<typename It1, typename It2>
It2 llvm::SmallVectorTemplateBase< T, isPodLike >::move ( It1 I,
It1 E,
It2 Dest )
inlinestaticprotected

Use move-assignment to move the range [I, E) onto the objects starting with "Dest". This is just <memory>'s std::move, but not all stdlibs actually provide that.

Definition at line 183 of file SmallVector.h.

Referenced by llvm::SmallVectorImpl< PointerUnion< Function *, Node * > >::erase(), llvm::SmallVectorImpl< PointerUnion< Function *, Node * > >::erase(), and llvm::SmallVectorImpl< T >::operator=().

◆ move_backward()

template<typename T, bool isPodLike>
template<typename It1, typename It2>
It2 llvm::SmallVectorTemplateBase< T, isPodLike >::move_backward ( It1 I,
It1 E,
It2 Dest )
inlinestaticprotected

Use move-assignment to move the range [I, E) onto the objects ending at "Dest", moving objects in reverse order. This is just <algorithm>'s std::move_backward, but not all stdlibs actually provide that.

Definition at line 194 of file SmallVector.h.

Referenced by llvm::SmallVectorImpl< PointerUnion< Function *, Node * > >::insert(), llvm::SmallVectorImpl< PointerUnion< Function *, Node * > >::insert(), llvm::SmallVectorImpl< PointerUnion< Function *, Node * > >::insert(), and llvm::SmallVectorImpl< PointerUnion< Function *, Node * > >::insert().

It2 Dest )
inlinestaticprotected

Copy the range [I, E) onto the uninitialized memory starting with "Dest", constructing elements as needed.
